children.heading: Funding for activities of the Secretary of the Interior
children.label: a Funding for activities of the Secretary of the Interior

children.text: sections 261, 265, and 266 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact;
sections 261, 265, and 266 of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact; and
Articles 1, 2, and 3 of the 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement.

children.heading: Funding for activities of the United States Postal Service
children.label: b Funding for activities of the United States Postal Service
A
children.text: Section 221(a)(2) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-FSM Compact.

children.label: B
children.text: Section 221(a)(2) of the 2023 Amended U.S.-RMI Compact.

children.label: D
children.text: Article 6(a) of the 2023 U.S.-Palau Compact Review Agreement.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The amounts appropriated to the United States Postal Service under paragraph (1) shall be deposited into the Postal Service Fund established under to carry out the provisions described in that paragraph.section 2003 of title 39

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: B Requirement
children.text: Any amounts deposited into the Postal Service Fund under subparagraph (A) shall be the fiduciary, fiscal, and audit responsibility of the Postal Service.

children.heading: Funding for Judicial training
children.label: c Funding for Judicial training
children.text: There is appropriated to the Secretary of the Interior to carry out out of any funds in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $550,000 for each of fiscal years 2024 through 2043, to remain available until expended.section 1988(d) of this title

children.heading: Treatment of previously appropriated amounts
children.label: d Treatment of previously appropriated amounts
children.text: The total amounts made available to the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands under subsection (a) shall be reduced by amounts made available to the Government of the Federated States of Micronesia and the Government of the Republic of the Marshall Islands, as applicable, under section 2101(a) of the Continuing Appropriations Act, 2024 and Other Extensions Act (; ) (as amended by section 101 of division B of the Further Continuing Appropriations and Other Extensions Act, 2024 (; ) and section 201 of the Further Additional Continuing Appropriations and Other Extensions Act, 2024 (; )).Public Law 118–15137 Stat. 81Public Law 118–22137 Stat. 114Public Law 118–35138 Stat. 7
